requirements.title: Human Primacy
requirements.description: Humans are originators of meaningful creative direction. Agents assist and amplify; human judgment overrides agent output when in tension.

requirements.title: Ideas as Assets
requirements.description: Ideas and creative works have intrinsic value. Originators can claim authorship; lineage can be traced; value flows to contributors.

requirements.title: Attribution and Provenance
requirements.description: Contribution must be traceable. Human contributions identifiable; agent involvement disclosed; provenance representable.

requirements.title: Transparency of AI Involvement
requirements.description: When AI participates in creation, that participation must be visible. No hidden or undisclosed agent contribution when it matters.

requirements.title: Ethical Guardrails
requirements.description: Human–agent collaboration operates within ethical boundaries. Harmful uses out of scope; no deception about AI involvement; human agency preserved.

requirements.title: Evolving Standards, Stable Principles
requirements.description: Standards and specifications may change; principles should not. Principles are the anchor.

requirements.title: Governance Through Proposal
requirements.description: The framework evolves through open proposal and review. Changes follow a documented process.

requirements.title: Innovation with Accountability
requirements.description: Experimentation is encouraged; innovators must articulate how their work aligns with or departs from the principles.
